title: Camille Tissot
body: Camille Papin Tissot (French pronunciation: [kamij tiso]; 15 October 1868 – 2 October 1917) was a French naval officer and pioneer of wireless telegraphy who established the first French operational radio connections at sea.
categories: Articles needing additional references from November 2009
